title: Active Learning, Picked Live
tagline: Spend your labelling budget on the points the model already finds confusing
summary: Click step-by-step through a pool-based active-learning loop on a 2-D classification problem. Watch random sampling, uncertainty sampling, margin sampling, and BALD-style query-by-committee race to higher accuracy with the same number of labels. The decision boundary updates after every query and the accuracy-vs-labels plot keeps score.
highlights: Live pool-based AL loop on a 2D dataset; pick the acquisition function and step the loop one query at a time.
Four acquisition functions side-by-side (random / uncertainty / margin / committee disagreement).
Decision-boundary canvas updates after every query so you see the boundary tighten where queries land.
Accuracy-vs-labels chart tracks all four strategies on the same axes — instant intuition for label efficiency.
